channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Appeals court restores DOGE access to sensitive information at US agencies
item.description: A federal appeals court is allowing billionaire Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency to once again access people’s private data at the Education Department, the Treasury Department and the Office of Personnel Management.
item.dc:creator: Lea Skene, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump administration asks Supreme Court to block order to return Maryland man from El Salvador
item.description: The Trump administration on Monday asked the Supreme Court to block a court order requiring it to return a Maryland man who was mistakenly deported to a notorious prison in El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Justice Department seeks to restrict testimony of fired pardon attorney
item.description: The Justice Department is attempting to use executive privilege to prevent its fired pardon attorney from telling Congress about the circumstances of her departure, and dispatched armed deputy U.S. marshals to her home to deliver restrictions on her testimony.
item.dc:creator: Eric Tucker And Alanna Durkin Richer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Appeals court blocks Trump from firing federal board members, tees up Supreme Court fight
item.description: The D.C. Circuit blocked Trump's firings of two federal officials, citing precedent and setting the stage for a high-stakes Supreme Court fight over executive authority.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FAFSA has struggled for years. Then Trump cut the Education Department in half
item.description: Last year’s FAFSA cycle turned into chaos as the Biden administration attempted to simplify the forms.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's Colorado portrait artist says career in jeopardy
item.description: The artist behind a portrait of President Trump that hung at the Colorado Capitol for six years says the president's comments are "negatively impacting" her business.
item.dc:creator: Elvia Limon, NewsNation

item.title: Kevin Hassett doubles down on Trump tariffs, says dozens of countries are asking to negotiate
item.description: Dozens of countries have asked to negotiate with President Donald Trump in the wake his tariff wave, according to White House Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Congress has the power to halt Trump's tariffs. But Republicans aren't ready to use it
item.description: Lawmakers are talking of clawing back their power to levy tariffs, but almost none seemed ready to turn their words into action. The Republican president is upending longstanding GOP principles like support for free trade.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: GOP senators back crackdown on foreign students
item.description: Republican senators are brushing off concerns that high-profile arrests and deportations of foreign students may ostracize a group that is a major contributor to the U.S. economy. International students injected $43.8 billion into the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Foreign journalists at US-backed media fear being sent to repressive homelands after Trump's cuts
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After hiding in Thailand for seven years, two Cambodian journalists arrived in the United States last year on work visas, aiming to keep providing people in their Southeast Asian homeland with objective, factual news through Radio Free Asia.
item.dc:creator: DIDI TANG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NY public schools tell Trump administration they won't comply with DEI order
item.description: New York state officials have told the Trump administration that they will not comply with its demands to end diversity, equity and inclusion practices in public schools, despite the administration's threats to terminate federal education funding.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Justice Department seeks 7 year sentence for George Santos
item.description: Prosecutors said the length of the requested sentence — 87 months — reflects the serious nature of Santos’s “unparalleled” crimes.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Hundreds of law firms, former judges sign onto briefs in support of Perkins Coie
item.description: The brief asks U.S. District Judge Beryl Howell to decide the case in the law firm’s favor and indefinitely block Trump’s order.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Trump backs Luna push for House parental proxy voting
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) has been scrambling to break an impasse over the push for proxy voting, after Luna joined with more than 200 Democrats and nine Republicans to use a procedure known as a discharge petition to circumvent leadership and force a vote on the matter.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, Fox 5

item.title: Republican state Sen. Randy Fine wins special election for Florida's 6th Congressional District
item.description: Republican state Sen. Randy Fine won a special election Tuesday to represent Florida's 6th Congressional District, defeating Democratic challenger Josh Weil and squashing efforts by national Democrats who spent millions of dollars on the race.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Missouri pastor gets deportation notice for sponsored son from Haiti
item.description: "Do we welcome immigrants in, if they come legally, and are pursing the citizenship process? Is that true or is that not?"
item.dc:creator: Hannah King, Fox 5

item.title: Luna accuses House Freedom Caucus of smear; exits group over parental proxy voting battle
item.description: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-Fla.) announced Monday that she is leaving the House Freedom Caucus amid her battle with GOP leadership and hard-line Republicans over her push to allow proxy voting for new parents.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, WFLA, NBC
